ducks.name: Socrates Duck
ducks.tagline: I know that I quack nothing.
ducks.description: A contemplative companion for anyone who would rather ask the right question than answer the wrong one. Hand-painted with a slightly furrowed brow and a beard that suggests deep thoughts about the nature of the bath.

ducks.name: Nietzsche Duck
ducks.tagline: Quack is dead. And we have killed him.
ducks.description: An intense, slightly brooding duck for those long afternoons spent staring into the abyss (or the soap dish). Will not flinch when you cancel plans. Comes with a tiny moustache.

ducks.name: Rubber Debug Duck
ducks.tagline: Have you tried explaining it to me?
ducks.description: The classic. Sits patiently on your desk while you walk through your code line by line. Many developers report that the bug becomes obvious somewhere around the third sentence.

ducks.name: Stack Trace Duck
ducks.tagline: Have you read the error message?
ducks.description: A slightly more confrontational debugging companion, for those moments when you need to be reminded that the answer is, in fact, in line 47. Wears tiny glasses.

ducks.name: Captain Quack
ducks.tagline: Arr, set sail for the soap dish!
ducks.description: A weathered sea captain with a tiny tricorne hat and a stern look that suggests it has seen things in the tub that you would not believe.

ducks.name: First Mate Mallard
ducks.description: Loyal, dependable, and ready to take a watch at any hour. Pairs well with Captain Quack for those who need a full bath-time crew.

ducks.name: Zen Master Duck
ducks.tagline: Be the duck. Float, do not flap.
ducks.description: A serene, half-lidded duck who reminds you to breathe. Excellent for meditation, deep work sessions, or convincing yourself that the deadline is, in fact, manageable.

ducks.name: Bath Time Bliss Duck
ducks.description: Soft, smiling, and faintly scented with lavender. The duck equivalent of a warm towel.

ducks.name: Mindful Meditation Duck
ducks.tagline: Notice the quack. Then let it go.
ducks.description: Sits in a tiny lotus pose. Helpful for sprint retrospectives and post-incident reviews alike.

ducks.name: Golden Anniversary Duck
ducks.description: A heritage piece, finished in 24-karat-look gold leaf. Only available while supplies last. Comes with a tiny certificate of authenticity that no court would accept.

ducks.name: Galaxy Edition Duck
ducks.description: Hand-painted with swirling nebulae and a faint dusting of glitter. Glows briefly under UV light. The kind of duck that makes you stop and stare into the middle distance.

ducks.name: Pirate Captain Plunder
ducks.tagline: Yo ho ho and a bottle of bubbles.
ducks.description: A rakish pirate duck with an eyepatch, a tiny cutlass, and a parrot that is, on closer inspection, also a duck.
